testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
13:59:06.258 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [cl.sanosysalvo.BFF.BffApplicationTests]: BffApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 13:59:06.587 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration cl.sanosysalvo.BFF.BffApplication for test class cl.sanosysalvo.BFF.BffApplicationTests 13:59:06.971 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [cl.sanosysalvo.BFF.BffApplicationTests]: BffApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 13:59:06.976 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration cl.sanosysalvo.BFF.BffApplication for test class cl.sanosysalvo.BFF.BffApplicationTests

While this cache implementation is useful for development and tests, it's recommended to use Caffeine cache in production.You can switch to using Caffeine cache, by adding it and org.springframework.cache.caffeine.CaffeineCacheManager to the classpath. 2026-05-12T13:59:13.624-04:00 INFO 11144 --- [BFF] [ main] cl.sanosysalvo.BFF.BffApplicationTests : Started BffApplicationTests in 6.107 seconds (process running for 8.778)
testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\thebo\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.17.8\byte-buddy-agent-1.17.8.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release
